properties.entry: DELETE FROM Channel WHERE Channel.id IN (:ids)

SELECT Channel.createDate, Channel.defaultChannel, Channel.id, Channel.name, Channel.state, ChannelDataSource.channelId, ChannelDataSource.dataSourceId, ChannelDataSource.groupIds FROM Channel JOIN ChannelDataSource ON Channel.id = ChannelDataSource.channelId WHERE ChannelDataSource.dataSourceId = :dataSourceId ORDER BY Channel.id

SELECT Channel.createDate, Channel.defaultChannel, Channel.id, Channel.name, Channel.state, ChannelDataSource.channelId, ChannelDataSource.dataSourceId, ChannelDataSource.groupIds FROM Channel JOIN ChannelDataSource ON Channel.id = ChannelDataSource.channelId WHERE ChannelDataSource.dataSourceId = :dataSourceId AND Channel.defaultChannel = :defaultChannel ORDER BY Channel.id

SELECT Channel.createDate, Channel.defaultChannel, Channel.id, Channel.name, Channel.state, ChannelDataSource.channelId, ChannelDataSource.dataSourceId, ChannelDataSource.groupIds FROM Channel, ( SELECT ChannelDataSource.channelId, ChannelDataSource.dataSourceId, ChannelDataSource.groupIds, UNNEST(ChannelDataSource.groupIds) AS groupId FROM ChannelDataSource ) ChannelDataSource WHERE Channel.id = ChannelDataSource.channelId AND ChannelDataSource.dataSourceId = :dataSourceId AND ChannelDataSource.groupId IN (:groupsIds) GROUP BY Channel.createDate, Channel.id, Channel.name, ChannelDataSource.channelId, ChannelDataSource.dataSourceId, ChannelDataSource.groupIds ORDER BY Channel.id
